highlights.headline: Milwaukee Brewers vs. Pittsburgh Pirates: Game Highlight

headlines.description: — Rookie phenom Esmerlyn Valdez hit two home runs, including a go-ahead grand slam in the seventh inning, and drove in six runs to rally the Pittsburgh Pirates to a 7-6 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers on Saturday in the first game of a doubleheader.
headlines.shortLinkText: Esmerlyn Valdez's grand slam, two homers lead Pirates past Brewers 7-6 in first game of doubleheader

headlines.description: — Royce Lewis hit a two-run homer and sparked the go-ahead rally with a seventh-inning double Saturday as the Minnesota Twins beat the Los Angeles Angels 5-3.
headlines.shortLinkText: Royce Lewis homers, doubles to lead Twins over Angels 5-3

headlines.description: — Chase Meidroth hit an RBI double in the sixth inning, five pitchers combined on a four-hitter and the Chicago White Sox sent the Athletics to their eighth straight loss with a 1-0 victory Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chase Meidroth hits RBI double, White Sox win 1-0 and send Athletics to 8th straight loss

events.name: New York Yankees at Washington Nationals

headlines.description: — Trent Grisham's two-run homer in of the eighth inning gave the Yankees another comeback victory over the Washington Nationals' bullpen, 4-2 on Saturday, giving Aaron Boone his 750th win as New York's manager.
headlines.shortLinkText: Yankees rally late again in Washington, this time with 4 in 8th for 4-2 victory and 3rd win in row

headlines.description: — Tyler Mahle won for the first time since mid-April, Casey Schmitt hit a tiebreaking three-run homer in the sixth inning and the San Francisco Giants beat the Colorado Rockies 4-2 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mahle gets first win since April and Schmitt hits go-ahead, 3-run homer as Giants beat Rockies 4-2

headlines.description: — Andrew Monasterio and Masataka Yoshida hit two-run homers as the surging Boston Red Sox played after a night of normal rest and extended their winning streak to eight games with a 4-0 victory over the New York Mets on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Monasterio, Yoshida hit 2-run homers as Red Sox beat Mets 4-0 for 8-game winning streak
